selectIDCardReader() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ReaderManagement
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a UAE smart card from the discovered list of readers
selectReaderByATR(char[]) - Method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ReaderManagement
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object from the discovered list of readers that matches a specific ATR
selectReaderByName(String) - Method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ReaderManagement
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object from the discovered list of readers that matches a specific name
selectSAM() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ReaderManagement
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a SAM card from the discovered list of readers
selectTestIDCardReader() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ReaderManagement
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a test card from the discovered list of readers
